SOURCES.name: tb_patientrecord
SOURCES.query: SELECT patientrecordid, patientrecordid_vp, patientid, patientcode, patientname, patientrecorddate, receptiondate, medicalrecordid_in, medicalrecorddate_in, medicalrecordid_out, medicalrecorddate_out, departmentid, roomid, bedid_out, chamberid_out, dm_receptionobjectid, dm_patientobjectid, dm_patientrecordtypeid, dm_patientrecordstatusid, dm_medicalrecordtypeid_in, dm_medicalrecordstatusid_out, dm_bhyt_loaiid, dm_ketquadieutriid, dm_hinhthucravienid, chandoan_kb_main_icd10, chandoan_in_icd10, chandoan_out_main_icd10, chandoan_kb_ex_icd10, chandoan_in_icd10_kemtheo, chandoan_out_ex_icd10, insurancecode, tongchiphi, tongbhyt, tongbenhnhan, tongdathu FROM public.tb_patientrecord ORDER BY patientrecordid LIMIT 1000

SOURCES.name: tb_invoice
SOURCES.query: SELECT i.invoiceid, i.patientrecordid, i.invoicedate, i.departmentid, i.roomid, i.sotienphieu, i.sotienmiengiam, i.dm_invoice_typeid, i.dm_invoice_hinhthucid, i.dm_invoice_typedetailid, i.dm_nhomthanhtoanid, i.dm_vienphi_nguonthanhtoanid, i.dm_patientrecordtypeid FROM public.tb_invoice i JOIN (SELECT patientrecordid FROM public.tb_patientrecord ORDER BY patientrecordid LIMIT 1000) p ON i.patientrecordid = p.patientrecordid

SOURCES.name: tb_treatment
SOURCES.query: SELECT t.treatmentid, t.patientrecordid, t.patientid, t.treatmentdate, t.departmentid, t.roomid, t.iscapcuu, t.dm_treatmenttypeid, t.dm_treatmentstatusid, t.checkin_time, t.checkin_status, t.end_treatmentdate, t.chandoan_icd10, t.chandoan, t.thongtincanhbaoxn FROM public.tb_treatment t JOIN (SELECT patientrecordid FROM public.tb_patientrecord ORDER BY patientrecordid LIMIT 1000) p ON t.patientrecordid = p.patientrecordid

SOURCES.name: tb_bed
SOURCES.query: SELECT bedid, roomid, chamberid, hospitalunitid, departmentid, bedcode, bedname, beddisable, dm_bedtypeid, listmedicalrecordid, isgiuongngoaikhoa FROM public.tb_bed

SOURCES.name: tb_department
SOURCES.query: SELECT departmentid, hospitalunitid, departmentcode, departmentname, dm_departmenttypeid, departmentdisable, sogiuongkehoach, sogiuongthucke, departmentorder FROM public.tb_department

SOURCES.name: tb_phacdodieutri
SOURCES.query: SELECT phacdodieutriid, maphacdo, tenphacdo, ghichu, listmabenhicd10, dm_phacdogroupid, songaydieutri, version FROM public.tb_phacdodieutri

SOURCES.name: tb_phacdodieutri_phieudieutri
SOURCES.query: SELECT phacdodieutri_phieudieutriid, phacdodieutriid, ngaydieutriphacdo, chedoanuong, chedochamsoc, huongxuly, ghichuphacdo, version FROM public.tb_phacdodieutri_phieudieutri
